upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yat parvate na samaSIta haryata indrasya vajraH' (aTarva0 20152)
'sakto na baBUva saNgaM nApetyAha**
mA saMSayizWA na gadeva vajraM syAnnizPalam…' (BA0 pu0 61119) saMSayaM mA kArzIrityAha
'tameva sTARuM jYAtuM saMSayituM vA necCati' (sANKyakA0 46 atra gOqapAdaBAzyam) atra saMSIN sakarmakaH prayuktaH
'saMSayya karRAdizu tizWate yaH' (ki0 314) kvacidarTe niScayamanaDigamyetyarTaH BAvABAvaprakArakaM jYAnaM saMSayaH
'na saMSayamanAruhya naro BadrARi paSyati' (hita0 27) saMSayaM kfcCram Bayam saMkawam
'agnihotrAdahamaByAgatAsmi viprarzaBARAM saMSayacCedanAya' (BA0 vana0 18622) saMSayacCedanAya=vivAdapadanirRayAya
'ApatsaMSayitA SreyaH' (rA0 65711) saMSayitA sAMSayikI
'patitAH pAtyamAnASca kzitO kzIRA viSerate' (BA0 karRa0 7927) viSerate Serate viriha viSezakfnna vikIrRAH Serata iti vArTaH
'muYcanti gurvaSucitAviSayena kiM na' (viSva0 ca0 29368) viSayaH saMSayaH
'tatra yATAkAmI SabdArTasya viSayitvAt' (satyA0 SrO0 2545) viSayI sandehAspadam
'tat kiM jIvo veditavyenopadiSyata uta muKyaH prARa uta paramAtmeti viSaya' (vra0 sU0 SAM0 BA0 1416) viSayaH saMSayaH
'jyogeva dIrGaM tama ASayizWAH' (f0 101241) ASayizWA AsTAya SayanamakArzIrityarTaH
'nAsya jAyA SatavAhI kalyARI talpamASaye' (aTarva0 51712) talpamASaye talpamaDiSeta ityAha
'yaste garBamamIvA durRAmA yonimASaye' (f0 101622) ASaye ASete Srayate
'kusumAnyASerate zawpadAH' (vikrama0 223 pAWaBedaH) ASerate ASlizyanti
'ahimohAnamapa ASayAnam' (f0 5306) apa ASayAnam apsu Srayantam
'vftramASayAnaM sirAsu' (f0 112111) ihANSINakarmakaH
'sudyumnasyASayanpuMstvam' (BA0 pu0 9137) ASayan icCan ASayo'BiprAyastaM kurvannityarTa iti kalpanA
'ASayAScodapAnASca praBUtasalilAkarAH' BA0 SAM0 8615) ASayA nipAnAni
'ASayAgnidIptiH' (daSaku0 160) ASaya AmASayaH
'nirAnandaM gataSrIkaM hftArAmamivASayam' (BA0 Salya0 29103) ASayo vanasattvagrahaRAya kfto gartaH
'jagAma DaraRIM tUrRaM mahoraga ivASayam' (BA0 karRa0 1432) ASayo bilam iti kaverASayaH aBiprAya ityarTaH
'payasAmivASayaH' (ki0 23) ASaya ADAraH
'tanme dahati gAtrARi vizaM pItamivASaye' (rA0 656) ASayo hfdayam
'ahamAtmA guqAkeSa sarvaBUtASayasTitaH' (gItA 1020) ukto'rTaH
'vErasya rUpametadDi BedaM yAti muhurmuhuH sanDIyamAnamapi yaklinnAmbaramivASayam' (rAja0 7384).. uditacara evArTaH
'kleSakarmavipAkASayEraparAmfzwaH puruzaviSeza ISvaraH' (yo0 sU0 124) kleSakarmaRAM PalaM vipAkastadanuguRA vAsanA ASayA iti BAzyam
'' po vftvI rajaso buDnamASayat' (f0 1426) ASayat ASrityASeta
'ahimohamAnamapa ASayAnam' (f0 5306) ASayAnamAvftya SayAnam
'ityenamASayenABijuhoti' (ASva0 gf0 216) yasminnAjye puroqASaH SAyitaH sa ASaya ucyate
'prayuktavIci hastAgraM prasannavipulASayam' (saraH) (kaTA0 10112) ASayaH parimARam
'kuSalAkuSalASca karmASayAH samUlaGAtaM hatA Bavanti' (yogaBAzye) ASerate'tra sAMsArikA ityASayAH karmASayaH karmaniDiH
'laNkAvanaM siMhasamo'DiSete' (Bawwi0 1036) laNkAvane Seta ityarTaH
'aTADiSiSye prayataH pradoze raTam' (raGu0 528) upaviveSetyarTaH
'yA (AhutayaH) hutA aDiSerate kiM tABirjayati' (Sa0 brA0 146110) aDiSerate nIcEstizWanti
'vacasi yamaDiSayya syandate vAcakaSrIH' (kA0 sU0 vf0 1221 ityatrodDftaH SlokaH)
'aDyASayo vA sPuwapuRqarIkaM purADirAjaM tadalaYcakAra' (budDa0 19) aDyASayaH karRikA
'ahaM patInnAtiSaye nAtyaSne nAtiBUzaye' (BA0 vana0 23338) patInatikramya na Saye yAvanme patayo na Serate tAvannAhaM Saye ahaM jaGanyasaMveSinItyAha
'nEtAnatiSayejjAtu nAtyaSnIyAnna dUzayet' (BA0 SAM0 10810) ukto'rTaH
'pUrvAnmahABAga tayA'tiSeze' (raGu0 514) atikrAmasItyarTaH
'DAmnA'tiSAyayati DAma sahasraDAmnaH' (mudrA0 317) svArTeRic uktacara evArTaH
'caritena cAtiSayitA munayaH' (ki0 632) ativfttAH caritotkarzeRa pfzWataH kftA ityarTaH
'na Saknumo vayamAryasya matimatiSayitum' (mudrA0 3) atiSayitumatikramitum matimAhAtmyamatyetum
'mahArGastIrTAnAmiva hi mahatAM kopyatiSayaH' (uttara0 611) atiSayaH prakarza utkarzaH mAhAtmyam gOravam
'ratnAtiSayaprakASAByarTanaM' (varjayet) (kO0 a0 5410) atiSayo viSizwaH prasAdaH
'prAsAdaSoBAtiSayAluBiH paTi praBornivAsAH pawaveSmaBirbaBuH' (SiSu0 1263) prAsAda0=prAsAdaSoBAtiSAyanaSIlEH
'tadye ete aBitaH pucCakARqaM SiKaRqAsTe ucCayAte' (Sa0 brA0 4575) ucCayAte udgate BavataH
'te hAsurA asUyanta ivocuryAvadevEza vizRuraBiSete tAvad vo dadmaH' (Sa0 brA0 1251) yAvadaBiSete yAvantaM pradeSaM Sayanena (nipadya) parigfhRAti AvfRoti
'pratiSizye jalaniDiM viDivatkuSasaMstare' (BA0 vana0 28332) arirAtsayopozitaH sanvArAMniDeraBimuKe Sayizye yAvatprasAdamityAha
'anayA kilAsmE pratiSayitAya svapne samAdizwam' (daSaku0) ukto'rTaH
'sarvasya pratiSIvarI BUmistvopasTa ADita' (tE0 saM0 1440) pratiSIvarI aBimuKaSAyinIti sAyaRaH pratiSIvarI pratyekaM suKena SayanADikaraRaBUtA SeterORAdikaH kvarac iti BawwaBAskaraH
'mA hiMsIstatra no BUme sarvasya pratiSIvari' (aTarva0 12134)
'ahannahiM pari SayAnamarRaH' (f0 6304) arRaH apaH pari SayAnam paritaH SayAnam upasargAtkAraRAd DAtuH sakarmakaH
'enaM te BrAtaraH pari Sere' (tE0 saM0 62844) ukto'rTaH
'vapAmekaH pari Saye' (tE0 saM0 63740) samIpe Seta ityarTaH
'viSaM viSaM maGavA paryaSAyata' (aTarva0 20176) taM taM yajamAnaM maGavA pariSete prAptavAn BavatItyAha
'sarvato vA aSvABiDAnI muKaM pariSete' (Sa0 brA0 63127) aSvasya muKaM paritaH sTitA BavatItyarTaH
'na hyetA IlayantyA tftIyasavanAt pari Sere' (tE0 saM0 64311) pariSere'vicalitA avatizWante
'adBirariktena pAtreRa yAH pUtAH' (ApaH) pari Serate (bO0 SrO0 13)
'EtasmAtkAlAdupaSete' (Sa0 brA0 4245) Druvo graha etAvantaM kAlamavasTito BavatItyAha
'uttarato hi strI pumAMsamupaSete' (Sa0 brA0 11120) samIpe vAmataH Seta ityarTaH
'gatAsumetamupa Seza ehi' (f0 10188)
'sukanye kamimaM jIrRi kftyArUpamupaSeza'AvAmanuprehIti' (Sa0 brA0 4159)
'svarge loke'psarasa enaM jAyA BUtvopaSerate' (BAzye )
'yadAtmanyupaSete sAtmyArTo hyupaSayArTaH' (caraka0 vi0 123) nigadavyAKyAtam
'kIdfSaM BojanaM yuzmAkamupaSete' (avadA0 mEtrI0 jA0) upaSete sAtmyamanukUlaM BavatItyarTaH
'Apa upaSerate uzRASca SItASca' (BA0 gf0 219)
'agnInupaSayAnasya rAjYaH' (BA0 anu0 79) samIpe SayAnasya

'nidAnaM pUrvarUpARi rUpARyupaSayastaTA samprAptiSceti vijYAnaM rogARAM paYcaDA smftam.. upaSayaH punarhetuvyADiviparItAnAM viparItArTakAriRAmOzaDAhAravihArARAmupayogaH suKAnubanDaH' (caraka0 ni0 19) nigadavyAKyAtam

'nidAnoktAnupaSayo viparItopaSAyitA' (vAgBawa0 ni0 a0 2) vikAravarDako'rTo'nupaSayaH
'hanti nopaSayasTo pi SayAlurmfgayurmfgAn' (SiSu0 280) aTopaSayaH sTAne yatra sTitvA hi lubDakAH

'mfdamupaSayAM nidaDAti' (kA0 SrO0 1647) uKAM kriyamARAmupaSete atiricyata ityupaSayA
